CustomField.description: Transaction Finalizer class name (implements ITransactionFinalizer) for async execution finalization. Optional - if not specified, no finalizer is attached to async transactions. The finalizer is guaranteed to execute even on unhandled exceptions (platform guarantee). Example: MyErrorLoggingFinalizer, MyRetryFinalizer
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Transaction Finalizer class name (implements ITransactionFinalizer) for async execution finalization. Optional - if not specified, no finalizer is attached.
CustomField.label: Transaction Finalizer Class Name
